rules: Static router baseline is ratified from the demo suite and policy contract only.
Shadow and learned router upgrades remain gated by later ratification order.
No learned-router cutover is admissible unless the frozen comparator suite shows a clean win over the best static baseline with no regression.
Multi-lobe orchestration remains blocked until learned-router superiority is actually earned.
summary: Router promotion is limited to deterministic policy and receipted demo-suite behavior until further ratification; W5 keeps the static baseline canonical unless a no-regression superiority win is earned.
